name: cad
description: CAD, robotics, fabrication, and local review skills packaged for agent plugin installs.

interface.shortDescription: CAD, robotics, fabrication, and local review skills.
interface.longDescription: CAD Skills packages local agent workflows for generating CAD, inspecting models, sourcing STEP parts, writing robot description files, slicing mesh files, and preparing fabrication handoffs.
defaultPrompt: Create a CAD model and open it in CAD Viewer.
Generate a URDF and review it locally.
Slice a mesh into printer-ready G-code.
